---
title: "Md Ragib Rownak"
image: images/Headshot_rownak.png
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/rownak01
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:rownak.1@osu.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ragibrownak
    - text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YHr3XgYAAAAJ&hl=en
---

## About Me

I am a PhD candidate in Mechanical Engineering at [The Ohio State University](https://www.osu.edu/) ([Center for Automotive Research](https://car.osu.edu/)), graduating in **December 2026**. I develop AI/ML-driven solutions for next-generation electrified vehicles — combining **deep reinforcement learning**, **Transformer-based models**, and **physics-informed simulations** to make powertrains smarter, more efficient, and longer-lasting.

My PhD research, conducted in collaboration with [Cummins Inc.](https://www.cummins.com/), tackles a critical industry challenge: **how to optimally control hybrid-electric powertrains while simultaneously managing the aging of batteries, electric machines, and aftertreatment systems** — a problem that directly impacts vehicle lifetime cost, warranty risk, and fleet sustainability.

I am seeking full-time roles in **AI/ML engineering**, **controls engineering**, **powertrain systems**, or **applied research** starting early 2027.

---

## Highlights

- **88% reduction** in battery cycling degradation through physics-aware RL control, while staying within 1.1--4.8% of the fuel-optimal benchmark
- **2.96% prediction error** on battery capacity fade using a Physics-Informed Transformer, outperforming LSTM and standard Transformer baselines across 17 cells from 5 datasets
- **13+ publications** including IEEE, SAE, and journal papers — 7 as first author
- **5+ years** of research at the intersection of AI/ML, control systems, and electrified powertrains
- **Industry collaboration** with Cummins Inc. delivering technical milestones on heavy-duty Class 8 series-hybrid platforms
- **Cross-domain expertise** spanning reinforcement learning, Transformer architectures, physics-based modeling, and multi-objective optimization

---

## Technical Skills

| Category | Skills |
|----------|--------|
| **Languages** | Python, MATLAB, C, C++ |
| **AI/ML** | PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn; Transformers, RNN/LSTM; RL (SAC, PPO, TD3, GRPO, DDPG) |
| **Optimization** | Dynamic Programming, MINLP, MDP, NSGA-II, CasADi |
| **Modeling & Sim** | MATLAB/Simulink, Physics-based aging models (Battery, EM, Aftertreatment), Powertrain simulation |
| **Tools** | Git, LaTeX, CUDA, Docker, AutoCAD, SOLIDWORKS |

---

## Education

**The Ohio State University** | Columbus, OH

- Ph.D. in Mechanical Engineering | Jan 2021 -- Dec 2026 (expected)
  - Dissertation: *Aging-Aware Learning-Based Control for Electrified Powertrains*
  - Advisor: [Dr. Qadeer Ahmed](https://car.osu.edu/people/ahmed.358)
- M.S. in Mechanical Engineering | Dec 2023
  - Thesis: *Uncertainty in Multi-Objective Optimization: Weighted Entropy and Partition-Based Uncertainty Reduction*
  - Advisor: [Dr. Carol Smidts](https://mae.osu.edu/people/smidts.1)

**Bangladesh University of Engineering & Technology (BUET)** | Dhaka, Bangladesh

- B.S. in Mechanical Engineering | 2014 -- 2018

---

## News

- **May 03, 2026** -- Our paper "Physics-Aware Deep Reinforcement Learning for Energy and Aging Management in Electrified Powertrains" accepted at *IEEE Transactions on Transportation Electrification*
- **Apr 2026** -- Joining [Cummins Inc.](https://www.cummins.com/) as a **Powertrain Electrification Controls Intern** in Columbus, IN for Summer 2026
- **Mar 31, 2026** -- Submitted "Ranking-Augmented On-Policy Optimization with Adaptive Advantage-Normalization for Constrained Control" to [IEEE CDC 2026](https://cdc2026.ieeecss.org/) (Honolulu, Hawaii)
- **Feb 06, 2026** -- Submitted "Physics-Aware Deep Reinforcement Learning for Energy and Aging Management in Electrified Powertrains" for journal review
- **Jan 19, 2026** -- Our paper "Learning Battery Aging Dynamics using Physics-Informed Transformer" accepted at *IEEE Transactions on Transportation Electrification*
- **Dec 17, 2025** -- Submitted "Learning Battery Aging Dynamics using Physics-Informed Transformer" to *IEEE Transactions on Transportation Electrification*
- **Jun 19, 2025** -- Our work on aging model robustness for heavy-duty EVs presented at [IEEE ITEC 2025](https://itec-conf.com/), Anaheim, CA
- **Apr 09, 2025** -- Our work on powertrain aging model selection presented at [SAE WCX 2025](https://wcx.sae.org/), Detroit, MI
- **Dec 2024** -- Submitted paper to IEEE ITEC 2025
- **Sep 2024** -- Submitted paper to SAE WCX 2025

---

## Selected Publications

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
![](images/papers/padrl.png){fig-alt="Pareto trade-off across PA-SAC variants"}
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-9}
**Physics-Aware Deep Reinforcement Learning for Energy and Aging Management in Electrified Powertrains**
**M.R. Rownak**, W. Jaleel, A. Hanif, M.Q. Fahim, D.D. Le, H. Anwar, M. Nelson, & Q. Ahmed
*IEEE Transactions on Transportation Electrification*, 2026 (accepted)
:::
:::

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
![](images/papers/pi_transformer.png){fig-alt="PI-Transformer correction vs PB-ROM residual"}
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-9}
**Learning Battery Aging Dynamics Using Physics-Informed Transformer**
**M.R. Rownak**, A. Hanif, M.Q. Fahim, D.D. Le, H. Anwar, W. Jaleel, M. Nelson, & Q. Ahmed
*IEEE Transactions on Transportation Electrification*, vol. 12, no. 2, pp. 3792–3804, April 2026.
[doi:10.1109/TTE.2026.3658446](https://doi.org/10.1109/TTE.2026.3658446)
:::
:::

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
![](images/papers/itec25.png){fig-alt="Aging model robustness: current profile and capacity degradation"}
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-9}
**Robustness and Sensitivity of Aging Models for Batteries and Electric Machines in Heavy-Duty Electrified Powertrains**
**M.R. Rownak**, A. Hanif, Q. Ahmed, M.Q. Fahim, H. Anwar, H. Li, D.D. Le, & M. Nelson
*IEEE ITEC 2025*, Anaheim, CA.
:::
:::

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
![](images/papers/wcx25.png){fig-alt="Battery aging cause-mechanism-effect block diagram"}
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-9}
**Powertrain Components Aging Model Selection for Energy Efficient Vehicles: Selection Strategy and Challenges**
**M.R. Rownak**, A. Hanif, Q. Ahmed, M.Q. Fahim, H. Anwar, H. Li, D. Le, & M. Nelson
*SAE WCX 2025*, Detroit, MI.
:::
:::

[See all publications →](publications.qmd)

---

## Visitors

A small dot for every visitor.

<script type="text/javascript" id="mapmyvisitors" src="//mapmyvisitors.com/map.js?d=EtVVmR3otOeDudN-9jHh1ZEaqp9ADskMZ4nu6pdWW6c&cl=ffffff&w=a"></script>
